score.label: Not Interested | Lacks Discipline | Motivated but Directionless | Careless and Inconsistent | Consistent Performer | Reliable and Productive | Problem Identifier | Problem Solver | Innovative and Experimental | Exceptional Performer
score.justification: Free text: explanation citing specific evidence from transcript, 2-4 sentences

evidence.quote: exact quote from transcript (verbatim or near-verbatim)
evidence.interpretation: Free text: what this quote means for scoring, distinguishing Layer 1 vs Layer 2 work

kpiMapping.kpi: Lead Generation | Lead Conversion | Upselling | Cross-selling | NPS | PAT | TAT | Quality
kpiMapping.evidence: transcript excerpt showing this KPI connection

gaps.detail: Free text: specific explanation of what's missing or not demonstrated, citing transcript where relevant

followUpQuestions.question: Specific question to ask supervisor in follow-up call
followUpQuestions.lookingFor: Free text: what evidence this question should surface
